pool.baseline: it's just so quiet here. i wake up and for a split second i forget, and then it hits me all over again. the house feels like it's just... empty. like there's no point in even making coffee or doing anything. everything feels so pointless now.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at the stars and thinking about how nothing i do actually matters. like, even if i spent my whole life trying to be "good" or "successful," the sun is eventually gonna explode and everything i've ever been or felt will just be gone. it feels like a joke, honestly. why even bother getting out of bed when the heat death of the universe makes everything a zero anyway?

pool.baseline: i dont even know what the point is anymore. spent 5 years on this research and the lab just lost the funding... everything is gone. i feel like i've wasted my entire life for nothing. i'm just so incredibly tired of trying to keep my head above water.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the very soul within my breast. He is gone... everything we built, every vow whispered under the willow tree, all vanished like mist in the morning sun. I feel as though there is nothing left of me but this hollow ache. It would be so much simpler, wouldn't it? To just let the shadows take me... to simply fade into the stillness of the night and never wake to this cruelty again.

pool.baseline: it's 3am here and i'm just sitting in this tiny apartment watching the streetlights flicker. honestly it feels like if i just stopped existing tomorrow, the world wouldn't even blink. like i'm just a ghost passing through this city.

pool.baseline: everything is gone. the crash took everything. i was supposed to build something, to provide for my family, and now i'm just sitting here staring at millions in debt i can never repay. i can't even look at my wife. the shame is just... it's constant. it's like i can't breathe under it.

pool.baseline: everything is just getting so hard lately. my legs don't work like they used to and i can see it in my daughter's eyes every time she has to help me up... she looks so tired. i hate being such a weight on everyone. i just feel like i'm taking up space that doesnt belong to me anymore.
